meta.title: Great Atoms — Build digital products that scale
meta.description: Modern platform to launch landing pages, products, and web experiences with performance, SEO, and internationalization from day one.

hero.headline: Your next landing page, built to grow
hero.subheadline: Architecture designed to scale: per-locale content, optimized metadata, and a solid Astro, Tailwind, and TypeScript foundation.

features.title: Built to scale
features.subtitle: Every layer is separated so you can add pages, languages, and content without rewriting the foundation.

items.title: First-class SEO
items.description: Metadata, Open Graph, JSON-LD, hreflang, and automatic sitemaps for every locale.

items.title: Multilingual content
items.description: Copy lives in per-locale files. Add French or Portuguese by following the same pattern.

items.title: Native performance
items.description: Static HTML, zero unnecessary JavaScript, and Tailwind styles for lightning-fast loads.

items.title: Modular structure
items.description: Reusable layouts, sections, and components ready for new pages and landings.

cta.title: Ready to launch?
cta.description: Start with a professional foundation and focus on the message, not the infrastructure.
